pr.title: Record: Scylla + Full GPTQ + XSA-all + FA3 — val_bpb 0.9485 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines the Scylla tokenizer with the PR #1060 stack to run full Hessian GPTQ, XSA on every layer, and FA3 attention for a modern quantized LM build.
techniques: Full Hessian GPTQ with Cholesky compensation
XSA on all 11 layers paired with FlashAttention 3
Coprime-stride multi-shard loader with 998-token Scylla tokenizer retokenization
